name: Hakone-chan
original_name: 温泉幼精ハコネちゃん
overview:
Hakone, the spirit of the hot springs, has descended into the hot spring town.  However, she had been sleeping for a long time, and she looked like a little girl!  Toya, a high school student who happened to be there, will cooperate to regain her original power.

A slapstick hot spring comedy created by the residents of the hot spring town and Hakone ! Finally decided to animate! !!
